data.body: Kickoff (config-prune half of epic cummy-monkeyish-dassie / 8d27). User scoped this run: land the 6 config/doc stories first (28f1, 4cdf, 7ed9, d6bd, c366, then doc-sweep 5566), THEN start identity subtree (297d) — escalating when GitHub/AWS access is needed. Worktree /Users/joeoakhart/rebar-config-prune on branch epic-cummy-config-prune @ origin/main 81a15f4df. Gates ON: require_plan_review_for_claim, require_completion_verification_for_close. Landing method: Gerrit stacked relation-chain to refs/for/main; commit-msg + pre-commit hooks installed. Stack order (all touch _config_schema.py so serial chain): 28f1 -> 4cdf -> 7ed9 -> d6bd -> c366 -> 5566.
